Party Stylist & Prop Curator

Featured First

Ceremony Arch Styling

Our most eye-catching setup: a wooden arch dressed in flowing white fabric, soft florals, lanterns, and wooden crate accents. Perfect for intimate ceremonies, vow renewals, proposals, and shore celebrations.

  • Wood arch with soft white draping
  • Floral and greenery styling
  • Lantern and crate accents
  • Delivery, setup, and breakdown

Client Reviews

Kind Words from Happy Clients

thank you for trusting CWK with your special moments

Clare Brigid
Wedding Client · June 4 at 9:02 PM
★★★★★

They did a fabulous job for my wedding and were absolute life savers! The communication was amazing, very friendly and took our vision and made it come to life. It was such a pleasure to work with them!

Shannon Archer
Baby Shower Client · September 15, 2025
★★★★★

We rented props for my daughter’s baby shower and couldn’t have asked for a better experience! Carrie was so friendly, easy to work with and communicated everything perfectly. She saw my vision and made it happen. The props were gorgeous and added the perfect touch to the shower. Thank you so much! Highly recommend.
